commandsRun.command: grep -nE '## Failure Modes|Oracle Stale|PVM Unavailable|Liquidity Exhausted|Circuit Breaker|Emergency Procedures|## Deployment Guide|### Required Environment Variables|### Deployment Order|### PVM Compilation|### Post-Deployment Checklist' README.md
commandsRun.observation: README contains the Failure Modes table with all five required scenarios and a Deployment Guide section containing env vars, deployment order, PVM compilation, and a post-deployment checklist.

searches.pattern: Oracle Stale|PVM Unavailable|Liquidity Exhausted|Circuit Breaker|Emergency Procedures|Required Environment Variables|Deployment Order|PVM Compilation|Post-Deployment Checklist

assertionResults.title: README contains the failure mode catalog
observations: README has a Failure Modes section at line 272.
The table explicitly covers Oracle Stale, PVM Unavailable, Liquidity Exhausted, Circuit Breaker, and Emergency Procedures.
Each row includes impact and recovery text rather than only a heading mention.

assertionResults.title: README contains the deployment guide
observations: README has a Deployment Guide section at line 430.
Subsections Required Environment Variables, Deployment Order, PVM Compilation, and Post-Deployment Checklist are all present.
The guide includes concrete env vars and command examples, not just a pointer.

conciseObservations: VAL-DOCS-003 passed: README Failure Modes covers all five required scenarios with impact and recovery language.
VAL-DOCS-004 passed: README Deployment Guide includes env vars, deployment order, PVM compilation, and post-deployment checklist sections.
summary: Validated the failure-mode and deployment-guide assertions for docs-diagrams-honesty. Both assertions pass based on the current README content.
